{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric constructs
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aetheric constructs]] can be manifested from a pattern of memory.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator's [[aura]] is blue, which makes his [[Aetheric constructs]] blue.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
